creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Zuo from comment #0)
Perhaps yes, this might be a reasonable mode of operation.  I am interested on the bapt@ opinion whether the current mode is useless or should be preserved.

That said, implementing the descent into the descendants of the subordinate reapers is somewhat clumsy, most likely proctree lock would need to be taken exclusive to allow marking the processes for tree traversal.
